Grubhub for Drivers

Shift Tracker

ROLE
Design Lead
SHIPPED
2025
OVERVIEW
Built a new analytics tool giving drivers a full breakdown of earnings, deliveries, and trends so they can understand performance and act on insights. Together with the Scheduling Redesign, both projects are expected to lift median hourly earnings from $4–7 to $11–15, staff the 17% of meal times chronically understaffed, and generate $3.8M in annual cost savings.
